title: Result - Spain
content:
Welcome to Spain, the gateway to the Mediterranean and a land of great geographical wealth. From stunning coastlines and majestic mountains to vibrant cities and charming villages, Spain is the EU's most biodiverse country, boasting 45 UNESCO-recognized biosphere reserves.
Its rich cultural heritage, shaped by centuries of civilizations, shines through its cuisine, art, architecture, literature and music. Experience Spain’s nightlife at an outdoor café, concert, flamenco tablao, dinner party, or discoteca. Spain offers an unforgettable blend of nature, history and vibrant culture.

## Unique food tradition
Jamón ibérico (Spanish cured ham)
The tourism sector is pivotal for the country's economy, being Spain's main source of income, as the country is the second-most popular tourist destination in the world.

### Local legend or myth
Don Quixote: perhaps the most famous Spanish literary legend, created by Miguel de Cervantes. Quixote is a nobleman who becomes a self-styled knight and embarks on a series of adventures.

### Language of the Land
The official language of Spain is Castilian Spanish; however, some autonomous communities in Spain have their own official languages, including Catalan, Galician and Basque.
kilometres long, La Rambla in Barcelona is one of the world's most famous streets.
